# Returns and Refunds Policy

## Scope

This policy covers all consumer orders shipped from the Larkstead warehouse, including desk mats, monitor risers, and cable trays. Wholesale orders follow the terms in the master supply agreement instead.

## Refunds

Customers can return any item within 30 days of the delivery scan for a full refund to the original payment method. During the holiday season, orders placed in November or December carry an extended 60 day window.

Unopened items are refunded in full. For opened desk mats returned in resalable condition, the restocking fee is 10 percent of the item price; heavily used items are not eligible for refund at all.

## Exceptions

Personalised desk mats with custom printing are final sale. Damaged-in-transit claims bypass this policy entirely and go through the carrier claim flow.
